description: Master 100 — multi-firm routing validation (Capgemini, JP Morgan, HSBC, TCS, NASSCOM, Microsoft, Wipro/HCL/Deloitte/Nvidia, Software Office)

cases.title: Cannot Login to Capgemini MyWizard Portal
cases.description: Cannot login to Capgemini MyWizard employee portal after password reset. Self-service portal shows 'Invalid credentials'. Need access to submit weekly timesheet before Friday cutoff.

cases.title: Client VPN FortiClient Connection Failed Error 201
cases.description: FortiClient VPN to client Barclays environment fails with Error 201 authentication failed. Required for sprint demo with client stakeholders at 3 PM IST.

cases.title: Ransomware Detected on Project Laptop
cases.description: Security incident: CrowdStrike detected ransomware encryption on developer laptop. Project source code folder files renamed with .encrypted extension. Machine isolated from network.

cases.title: Company Laptop Screen Flickering After Dock Connect
cases.description: Capgemini-issued laptop screen flickers when connected to USB-C dock. Undocked display is fine. Affects daily client standup presentations.

cases.title: SAP S4HANA Transport Import Failed in QA
cases.description: SAP S4HANA transport import failed in client QA system with error 'Import cancelled due to object lock'. Blocking UAT sign-off for finance module.

cases.title: PostgreSQL Connection Pool Exhausted on Microservice
cases.description: PostgreSQL connection pool exhausted on client-order-service. API returning HTTP 500 errors. All 50 connections in use, no idle connections available.

cases.title: New Contractor Okta and Jira Provisioning
cases.description: New contractor joining client agile team Monday — need Okta SSO account, Jira project access, Confluence space, and client VPN profile per onboarding form ONB-CG-331.

cases.title: Floor Printer Paper Jam Cannot Print Deliverable
cases.description: HP printer on Bangalore EPIP campus Floor 5 has paper jam. Red jam light on, print queue stuck with 12 documents including client status report.

cases.title: Microsoft Teams Breakout Rooms Not Working
cases.description: Microsoft Teams breakout rooms fail to open during client workshop. Organizer sees 'Something went wrong' error. Main meeting audio works fine.

cases.title: Firewall Whitelist Client API Endpoint Port 8443
cases.description: Need firewall rule to whitelist client API endpoint payments.clientcorp.com on port 8443 from Capgemini dev subnet. Approved in change request CR-CG-2290.

cases.title: Phishing Email Mimicking Capgemini HR Payroll
cases.description: Security incident: multiple consultants received phishing email mimicking Capgemini HR payroll with malicious link. Four employees clicked before IT broadcast warning.

cases.title: Oracle Database Tablespace ORADATA 97 Percent Full
cases.description: Oracle database ORADATA tablespace at 97% on client production DB. Batch jobs failing with ORA-01653. Client SLA breach risk for nightly processing.

cases.title: Resigned Consultant Revoke All Client Access
cases.description: Consultant resigned effective today — immediate offboarding: disable AD, revoke Okta, client VPN, GitHub org, Jira, and ServiceNow access per HR exit ticket.

cases.title: Campus Wi-Fi Authentication Failing Pune Hinjewadi
cases.description: Corporate Wi-Fi at Pune Hinjewadi campus rejects valid credentials with 'Authentication server timeout'. Wired port on same desk works normally.

cases.title: Salesforce Lightning Page Blank After Sandbox Refresh
cases.description: Salesforce Lightning Experience loads blank white page after client sandbox refresh. Classic view works when switched manually. Affects CRM demo for client.

cases.title: Laptop Battery Drains to Zero in 30 Minutes
cases.description: Company laptop battery drains from 100% to 0% in 30 minutes even when plugged in. Power adapter connected, charging LED flickers. Need replacement for client site visit.

cases.title: Production API Keys Exposed in GitLab Repository
cases.description: Security incident: GitLab secret detection found production AWS access keys in client project repository. Merge request was approved by 3 reviewers before alert.

cases.title: MongoDB Replica Set Secondary Not Syncing
cases.description: MongoDB replica set secondary node stuck in RECOVERING state. Primary node healthy but read queries failing on secondary. Client reporting dashboard stale.

cases.title: ServiceNow Incident Form Submit Button Spins
cases.description: ServiceNow incident form submit spins indefinitely after filling all mandatory fields. No error message. Other ServiceNow modules load correctly in same session.

cases.title: MFA Authenticator Lost Need Device Re-Enrollment
cases.description: Lost phone with Microsoft Authenticator MFA app. Cannot login to corporate email or client VPN until new device enrolled. Manager confirmed identity via HR.

cases.title: JPMorgan Markets Login Locked After Failed Attempts
cases.description: Cannot login to JPMorgan Markets trading platform — account locked after 5 failed password attempts. Need access restored before US market open at 7 PM IST.

cases.title: Murex Trade Booking Interface Timeout
cases.description: Murex front-office trade booking screen times out on submit for FX derivatives. Other Murex modules load normally. Blocking EMEA desk trade capture.

cases.title: Spear Phishing Targeting Equities Trading Desk
cases.description: Security incident: equities trading desk received targeted phishing email with fake compliance PDF attachment. One trader opened file before SOC alert broadcast.

cases.title: Trading Floor Bloomberg Keyboard Unresponsive
cases.description: Bloomberg terminal keyboard not responding on Mumbai BKC trading floor. Market data displays but cannot execute BLAST or run analytics functions.

cases.title: SQL Server Deadlock on Risk Reporting Database
cases.description: SQL Server risk reporting database showing persistent deadlocks on VaR calculation stored procedures. Risk reports delayed 3 hours for global risk committee.

cases.title: GlobalProtect VPN Gateway Unreachable From Home
cases.description: GlobalProtect VPN to JPMC corporate network shows 'Gateway unreachable' from home office. Required for after-hours production support on payments platform.

cases.title: Confluence Page Blank After Chrome Update
cases.description: Atlassian Confluence pages load blank white screen in Google Chrome after corporate browser update. Confluence works in Edge on same machine.

cases.title: New Associate Onboarding AD and Trading IDs
cases.description: New associate joining Mumbai Technology team Monday — need AD account, JPMorgan SSO, Murex read access, and ServiceNow profile per HR ticket ONB-JPM-882.

cases.title: FIX Protocol Gateway Connection Dropped
cases.description: FIX protocol gateway connection to external broker dropped at 3 PM IST. Electronic equity orders not reaching exchange. Session shows LOGOUT received unexpectedly.

cases.title: Ransomware Alert on Shared Drive P Drive
cases.description: Security incident: files on shared P drive encrypted with .ryuk extension. CrowdStrike EDR alert on 4 workstations. Project documentation inaccessible.

cases.title: Oracle Exadata Tablespace Full on Payments DB
cases.description: Oracle Exadata PAYMENTS_PROD tablespace 99% full. Real-time payment posting failing with ORA-01653. Transaction volume spike since morning.

cases.title: Microsoft Teams Screen Share Black for Clients
cases.description: Microsoft Teams screen share shows black screen to external client attendees during deal review. Presenter sees content normally on Windows 11 laptop.

cases.title: Laptop Docking Station USB Ports Not Working
cases.description: Lenovo USB-C docking station USB ports not detecting keyboard and mouse on trading desk. Laptop built-in ports work. Dock power LED is green.

cases.title: Firewall Rule Blocking SWIFT Alliance Access
cases.description: Corporate firewall change blocking outbound connectivity to SWIFT Alliance Access server. Cross-border payment messages queuing since 9 AM IST.

cases.title: Splunk Alert API Keys in Git Repository
cases.description: Security incident: Splunk secret scanning detected production API keys committed to internal Git repository in merge request. Repo has 25 developer access.

cases.title: HSBCnet Corporate Banking Login Locked
cases.description: Cannot login to HSBCnet corporate banking portal — account locked after 3 failed attempts. Need urgent access to approve supplier payment batch before 4 PM IST cutoff.

cases.title: SWIFT GPI Payment Message Stuck in Queue
cases.description: Outbound SWIFT GPI payment messages stuck in middleware queue since 10 AM IST. 47 cross-border transfers pending for corporate clients. MQ channel shows RUNNING but no dequeue.

cases.title: Phishing Email Targeting Mumbai Treasury Team
cases.description: Security incident: Mumbai treasury team received spear-phishing email mimicking RBI notice with malicious Excel attachment. Two associates opened attachment before IT alert.

cases.title: Bloomberg Terminal Keyboard Not Responding
cases.description: Bloomberg terminal keyboard unresponsive on trading desk Mumbai office. Screen displays data but cannot enter commands or run functions. Backup terminal also affected.

cases.title: Oracle Flexcube Batch Job Failed EOD
cases.description: Oracle Flexcube end-of-day batch job FLEOD_BATCH failed at step 14 with ORA-01652 unable to extend temp segment. Core banking interest accrual not completed.

cases.title: VPN to GSC Hyderabad Fails Error 691
cases.description: Cisco AnyConnect VPN to GSC Hyderabad data center fails with Error 691 authentication failed. Required for production support shift starting 6 PM IST.

cases.title: KYC Document Upload Failing in Onboarding App
cases.description: Digital KYC onboarding application rejects Aadhaar and PAN document uploads with error 'File validation failed'. Web form loads but submit fails for all new retail accounts.

cases.title: Mainframe CICS Transaction Abend S0C4
cases.description: CICS region PRODBANK showing repeated S0C4 abends on account inquiry transaction CIQRY. Customer-facing ATM balance inquiry failing across Maharashtra ATMs.

cases.title: New Analyst AD Account and Bloomberg ID
cases.description: New joiner in Mumbai Global Banking team starts Monday — need Active Directory account, Bloomberg UUID, and HSBCnet read-only access per HR onboarding ticket ONB-4412.

cases.title: ATM Switch Network Link Down Pune Region
cases.description: ATM switch network link to Pune region concentrator down since 2 PM IST. 120 ATMs offline — customers cannot withdraw cash. MPLS circuit shows interface down on router.

cases.title: PCI Cardholder Data Found in Application Logs
cases.description: Security incident: Splunk alert detected full 16-digit card numbers in payment gateway application logs on app-pay-prod-02. Log retention policy violation — need immediate containment.

cases.title: Trade Finance LC Module Screen Freeze
cases.description: Trade finance letter-of-credit module freezes on document submission screen. Spinning loader for 10+ minutes. Other trade finance screens work. Blocking USD 2M LC issuance.

cases.title: PostgreSQL Standby Replication Lag 6 Hours
cases.description: PostgreSQL standby replica on reporting cluster 6 hours behind primary. Regulatory MIS reports showing stale data. Replication slot active but WAL apply stalled.

cases.title: Dual Monitor Setup Not Detecting Second Screen
cases.description: Trading desk dual monitor setup — second Dell 27-inch monitor not detected on workstation. Display settings show only one screen. Cable and monitor tested on colleague desk works.

cases.title: UPI Payment API Returning HTTP 503 Errors
cases.description: UPI payment integration API returning HTTP 503 to mobile banking app since 11 AM IST. NPCI switch connectivity check shows timeout. Customer complaints increasing on social media.

cases.title: Cannot Login to Ultimatix Employee Portal
cases.description: Cannot login to Ultimatix employee self-service portal — password rejected after recent reset. Need access to submit timesheet before payroll cutoff today.

cases.title: Client Site GlobalProtect VPN Connection Failed
cases.description: GlobalProtect VPN to client Citibank environment fails with 'Gateway unreachable' from home office. Required for daily standup and code commit access.

cases.title: Fake HR Payroll Phishing Email Reported
cases.description: Security incident: multiple associates received fake HR payroll email with malicious link. Three employees clicked link before warning sent. Need SecOps investigation.

cases.title: Company Laptop Battery Not Charging Past 15 Percent
cases.description: TCS-issued Dell Latitude battery stuck at 15% and not charging. Power adapter connected, LED shows charging but percentage never increases. Need replacement for client demo.

cases.title: SAP S4HANA Fiori App Transaction Timeout
cases.description: SAP S/4HANA Fiori purchase requisition app times out after 60 seconds on submit. Other Fiori tiles load fine. Blocking month-end procurement for client project.

cases.title: SQL Server Blocking Queries on Client Reporting DB
cases.description: SQL Server client reporting database showing severe blocking chains. Dashboard queries timing out after 5 minutes. Blocking session SPID 284 holding locks since 7 AM.

cases.title: New Joiner Laptop Email and AD Account Setup
cases.description: New associate joining Pune DC on Monday — need laptop image, Active Directory account, corporate email, and Ultimatix ID provisioned per onboarding checklist HR-2291.

cases.title: Floor 12 Printer Toner Empty Cannot Print
cases.description: HP printer on Floor 12 Pune campus shows 'Replace toner cartridge' and will not print client deliverable documents. Red toner light blinking.

cases.title: Microsoft Teams Screen Share Frozen for Client
cases.description: Microsoft Teams screen share freezes during client review call — attendees see static image. Camera and audio work. Teams version 24127, Windows 11.

cases.title: Firewall Whitelist Request for Client API Endpoint
cases.description: Need corporate firewall rule to allow outbound HTTPS from dev subnet to client API endpoint api.clientbank.com port 443. Change request CR-8842 approved by client IT.

cases.title: Ransomware Detected on Project Shared Folder
cases.description: Security incident: files on project shared drive P:\ClientABC encrypted with .lockbit extension. CrowdStrike alert on file server. Five team members cannot access deliverables.

cases.title: Oracle RMAN Backup Failed Archive Log Missing
cases.description: Oracle RMAN nightly backup failed with ORA-00257 archiver error. Archive log destination full on client DB server orcl-prod-01. Client SLA backup window missed.

cases.title: Forgot Password Cannot Login NASSCOM Member Portal
cases.description: Forgot my NASSCOM member portal password and self-service reset link expired. Cannot login to access event registration and industry reports. Need password reset before webinar tomorrow.

cases.title: Conference Room Printer Paper Jam Red Light
cases.description: HP printer in NASSCOM Bangalore office conference room has paper jam. Red jam indicator on, cannot print attendee badges for tomorrow's DeepTech summit session.

cases.title: Cisco VPN Error 807 Cannot Connect From Home
cases.description: Cisco AnyConnect VPN to NASSCOM corporate network fails with Error 807 from home office. Cannot access internal wiki or submit timesheet. Internet connection works fine.

cases.title: Google Chrome Shows Blank White Pages Only
cases.description: Google Chrome browser shows blank white page for all websites on work laptop. Microsoft Edge works fine on same machine. Cleared cache but issue persists.

cases.title: Outlook Desktop Search Returns No Results
cases.description: Microsoft Outlook desktop search returns no results for any email in mailbox. Web Outlook search works correctly. Need to find NASSCOM leadership meeting invite from last week.

cases.title: Wi-Fi Password Prompt Loop on MacBook
cases.description: Corporate Wi-Fi on MacBook keeps prompting for password in a loop. Credentials are correct but never connects. Wired ethernet port on desk works normally.

cases.title: Microsoft Teams Desktop Keeps Crashing on Launch
cases.description: Microsoft Teams desktop app crashes within 30 seconds of opening on Windows 11. Teams web version works in browser. Reinstall did not fix the issue.

cases.title: New Intern AD Account and Email Provisioning
cases.description: New intern joining NASSCOM Mumbai office Monday — need Active Directory account, corporate email, and VPN access provisioned per HR onboarding checklist ONB-NS-112.

cases.title: PostgreSQL Connection Pool Exhausted Member DB
cases.description: PostgreSQL member database connection pool exhausted on pg-member-prod. NASSCOM portal member login API returning HTTP 500 errors since 10 AM IST.

cases.title: Laptop USB-C Dock Monitor Not Detected
cases.description: Dell USB-C docking station — external monitor not detected when laptop connected. Laptop screen works, dock power LED green. Needed for dual-screen policy work.

cases.title: Azure AD Conditional Access Blocking Teams Login
cases.description: Cannot sign in to Microsoft Teams on corporate laptop — Azure AD Conditional Access policy blocks login with error AADSTS53003. Need access for executive briefing in 30 minutes.

cases.title: SharePoint Online Site Collection 503 Errors
cases.description: SharePoint Online intranet site returns HTTP 503 for all users in Redmond campus since 9 AM PST. Site collection SPO-ENG-PORTAL shows service unavailable in admin center.

cases.title: Defender Alert — Lateral Movement on Azure VM
cases.description: Microsoft Defender for Endpoint alert: suspected lateral movement detected on Azure VM WIN-PROD-4412 in East US subscription. Multiple failed RDP attempts from compromised service account.

cases.title: Surface Laptop Docking Station Dual Monitor Failure
cases.description: Surface Laptop 5 on docking station — external dual monitors not detected after Windows 11 23H2 update. USB-C dock LED solid white but displays show no signal.

cases.title: Azure SQL Managed Instance Failover Stuck
cases.description: Azure SQL Managed Instance MI-PROD-CRM failover operation stuck in progress for 45 minutes. Application teams report connection timeouts to *.database.windows.net endpoint.

cases.title: ExpressRoute Circuit BGP Session Down
cases.description: Azure ExpressRoute circuit ER-SEA-01 BGP session down with ISP. Hybrid connectivity between on-prem Seattle datacenter and Azure VNet PROD-VNET lost. SAP workloads unreachable.

cases.title: Power Platform Flow Failing on Dataverse Connector
cases.description: Power Automate cloud flow HR-Onboarding-Flow fails at Dataverse connector step with error 502 Bad Gateway. 120 new hire provisioning tasks blocked since yesterday.

cases.title: Visual Studio Enterprise License Activation Failed
cases.description: Visual Studio 2022 Enterprise fails activation with error 0x80070005 access denied. Developer needs build access for .NET 8 microservices release tonight.

cases.title: New Hire M365 E5 and Azure RBAC Provisioning
cases.description: New program manager starts Monday — need Microsoft 365 E5 license, Azure subscription Reader role on DEV-RG, and Entra ID security group SG-PM-TEAM per onboarding ticket ONB-8821.

cases.title: Sentinel SIEM Correlation Rule False Positive Flood
cases.description: Microsoft Sentinel workspace producing 4000+ false positive alerts per hour from custom KQL correlation rule CORR-AZ-LOGIN. SOC analysts cannot triage real incidents.

cases.title: Wipro VPN Authentication Failed Pune GDC
cases.description: Cisco AnyConnect VPN to Wipro Pune GDC fails with Error 691 authentication failed since morning IST. Cannot access client SAP landscape for release deployment tonight.

cases.title: HCL Campus Laptop Docking Station No Display
cases.description: Lenovo ThinkPad on USB-C dock at HCL Noida campus — dual monitors not detected after Windows update. Dock power LED on but external displays show no signal during client demo.

cases.title: Deloitte D365 F&O Batch Job Stuck Posting
cases.description: Dynamics 365 Finance batch job GL_POSTING stuck at step 7 for 3 hours affecting EMEA close. Application server responsive but batch framework shows repeated timeout on voucher posting.

cases.title: Nvidia CUDA Driver Crash on DGX Training Node
cases.description: Nvidia DGX A100 training node GPU0 CUDA driver crash during PyTorch distributed job. nvidia-smi shows GPU fallen off bus. ML research team blocked on LLM fine-tuning run NV-TRAIN-09.

cases.title: Wipro Phishing Campaign Targeting Delivery Managers
cases.description: Security incident: Wipro delivery managers received spear-phishing emails mimicking client PO approval with malicious macro attachment. Two managers enabled macros before SOC alert broadcast.

cases.title: HCL Oracle RAC Node Eviction ORA-29740
cases.description: Oracle RAC cluster PROD-HR one node evicted with ORA-29740 inconsistent membership. HCL managed services payroll database inaccessible for 2000 users across three client tenants.

cases.title: Deloitte New Consultant AD and ServiceNow Access
cases.description: New Deloitte technology consultant starts Monday — need Active Directory account, ServiceNow ITSM agent role, and client VDI group per onboarding ticket ONB-DTT-5521.

cases.title: Nvidia GitLab Runner Secret Leaked in CI Log
cases.description: Security incident: Nvidia GitLab CI pipeline log printed NVAPI deployment token in plain text on public runner job #88421. Token visible in build artifacts folder accessible to 40 engineers.

cases.title: Wipro ServiceNow MID Server Heartbeat Lost
cases.description: ServiceNow MID server MID-WIP-LON-03 heartbeat lost since 2 AM GMT. Discovery and orchestration jobs failing for UK banking client integration workspace.

cases.title: HCL MPLS Link Flapping Mumbai DC
cases.description: MPLS WAN circuit between HCL Mumbai DC and client DR site flapping every 10 minutes. BGP sessions reset repeatedly causing SAP GUI disconnects for 300 users.

cases.title: Outlook Desktop Crashes on Startup
cases.description: Microsoft Outlook desktop crashes immediately on launch with error 'Outlook could not start last time'. Safe mode also fails. Web Outlook works fine in browser.

cases.title: Excel Formulas Show #NAME Error After Update
cases.description: All Excel workbook formulas show #NAME? error after Office 365 update. Macros and data connections broken on monthly finance report. Other Office apps work.

cases.title: Teams Camera Shows Black Screen in Meetings
cases.description: Microsoft Teams video calls show black camera feed to other participants. Camera LED is on but preview is blank. Camera works in Windows Camera app.

cases.title: Chrome Blocks Approved Password Manager Extension
cases.description: Google Chrome shows 'Extension blocked by administrator' for approved 1Password browser extension. Cannot autofill credentials for internal tools.

cases.title: SAP GUI Session Times Out Every 5 Minutes
cases.description: SAP GUI desktop client disconnects every 5 minutes with message 'Session timed out'. Re-login works but session drops again during data entry.

cases.title: Adobe Acrobat Cannot Open Signed PDF Files
cases.description: Adobe Acrobat Reader DC fails to open digitally signed PDF contracts with error 'There was an error opening this document'. Browser PDF preview works.

cases.title: Visio License Activation Failed
cases.description: Microsoft Visio shows 'This product cannot be activated' after laptop replacement. Need Visio re-activated to edit network diagrams for audit.

cases.title: OneNote Notebook Stuck on Syncing Spinner
cases.description: Microsoft OneNote desktop shows perpetual 'Syncing...' on shared team notebook. New notes not visible to teammates. OneNote web shows old content only.
